title: Action on the Complaint/Report
content: Where the complaint/report alleges that illegal recruitment activities are ongoing, surveillance shall be undertaken at the premises where the alleged illegal recruitment activities are conducted. If illegal recruitment activities are confirmed, the POEA Director of the Licensing and Regulation Office (LRO) shall recommend to the POEA Administrator the institution of criminal action and/or the issuance of a closure order or order of preventive suspension.

metadata.source_file: Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022.pdf
